trans-unit.source: Split Payment has been turned on

trans-unit.source: Split Payment has been turned off

Codeunit ITI CU6620EventHandler - Method OnBeforeInsertOldSalesDocNoLine - NamedType ExtDocNoText

trans-unit.source: VAT must be 0% on lines of Debit Note. Check VAT Posting groups
trans-unit.note: Codeunit ITI DebitNoteMgt - NamedType DebitNoteVATPercentErr

trans-unit.source: Can't change the No. Series, when Debit Note is selected!
trans-unit.note: Codeunit ITI DebitNoteMgt - Method ValidatePostingNoSeries - NamedType CantChangeNoSeriesForDebitNoteErr

trans-unit.source: External Document No. %1 has been found in %2 documents:\
trans-unit.note: Codeunit ITI ExternalDocumentNoMgt - Method WasUsed - NamedType FoundDocMsg

trans-unit.source: The quantity in the line is below the minimum quantity of the picked price list line.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit ITI Price Calculation - V16 - NamedType PickedWrongMinQtyErr

trans-unit.source: The table passed as a parameter must be temporary.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit ITI Price Calculation - V16 - NamedType TempTableErr
Codeunit ITI SalesPriceMgt - NamedType Text000

trans-unit.source: The %1 in the %2 must be same as in the %3.

Codeunit ITI T111EventHandler - Method OnBeforeInsertInvLineFromShptLineBeforeInsertTextLine - NamedType ExtDocNoText

trans-unit.source: Field %1 will not be updated on related assembly orders.\Do you want to continue?
trans-unit.note: Codeunit ITI T36EventHandler - Method OnBeforeValidateExternalDocumentNo - NamedType UpdateQst
Codeunit ITI T6661EventHandler - Method OnBeforeInsertInvLineFromRetRcptLineBeforeInsertTextLine - NamedType ExtDocNoText

trans-unit.source: This action may lead to an inconsistency in stock because item was transferred to production already.\Do you want to continue?
trans-unit.note: Codeunit ITI T901EventHandler - Method ValidateInProdAssemblyLine - NamedType UpdateFieldQst

trans-unit.source: You could not update %1 because assembly order is in progress or completed
trans-unit.note: Codeunit ITI T905EventHandler - Method RunOnBeforeUpdateExistingLine - NamedType UpdateLineErr

trans-unit.source: User must have "SUPER" permission set to perform this operation.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Security Helper N24 - Method ThrowErrorIfUserHasNotSuperPermissionSet - NamedType UserMustBeSuperErr

trans-unit.source: The date formula %1 cannot be positive.

trans-unit.source: Specifies the range of values that are displayed in the matrix window, for example, the total period. To change the contents of the field, choose Next Set or Previous Set.

trans-unit.source: Go to the previous set of data.

Report Compensation Proposal - NamedType AmountForCompensationText
Report Compensation Proposal - NamedType ProposalMainTitleLbl
Report Compensation Proposal - NamedType RemainingAmountCaption

trans-unit.source: Using this proposal we confirm that all legally required conditions have been satisfied for compensation of monetary claims between:
trans-unit.note: Report Compensation Proposal - NamedType Text001

trans-unit.source: Compensation contains and applies to the following:
trans-unit.note: Report Compensation Proposal - NamedType Text002

trans-unit.source: 1. Monetary claim of company %1 to company %2 on basis of these documents:
trans-unit.note: Report Compensation Proposal - NamedType Text003

trans-unit.source: 2. Monetary claim of company %1 to company %2 on basis of these documents:
trans-unit.note: Report Compensation Proposal - NamedType Text004

trans-unit.source: Total amount in this compensation proposal is:
trans-unit.note: Report Compensation Proposal - NamedType Text008

trans-unit.source: If you confirm Compensation Proposal, please sign it and return one copy back.
trans-unit.note: Report Compensation Proposal - NamedType Text009
Report Compensation Proposal - NamedType Text010
Report Compensation Proposal - NamedType Text011
Report Compensation Proposal - NamedType Text012
Report Compensation Proposal - NamedType Text013
Report Compensation Proposal - NamedType TotalText
